trending_videos.title: Philadelphia 76ers at Boston Celtics
trending_videos.description: The Philadelphia 76ers face the Boston Celtics in Game 2 of the East first round at TD Garden. Boston leads 1-0 after a 123-91 win. Jayson Tatum had 25 points, 11 rebounds and seven assists in his first playoff game since an Achilles injury.

trending_videos.title: Evil Dead Burn | Date Announce Teaser
trending_videos.description:
Nowhere to hide. 🔥 #EvilDeadBurn only in theaters July 10. Full trailer coming soon.


Evil Dead Burn unleashes the franchise’s most savage and terrifying ride to date, blazing onto big screens with an all-new chapter of carnage and demonic mayhem. After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home. As one by one they are transformed into Deadites—turning the gathering into a family reunion from hell—she comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.

Director:  Sébastien Vaniček
Cast:  Souheila Yacoub, Tandi Wright, Hunter Doohan, Luciane Buchanan, Errol Shand, Maude Davey, George Pullar, Greta Van Den Brink

trending_videos.title: Utah Mammoth at Vegas Golden Knights
trending_videos.description: The Mammoth face the Golden Knights at T-Mobile Arena in Game 2 of the West first round. Vegas leads 1-0 after a 4-2 win. Logan Cooley scored the first playoff goal in Utah history while Mark Stone tied it and the Knights pulled the victory away.

trending_videos.description:
The Vampire King is free. Monsters lurk in the shadows and roam the city. Dracula returns... 🩸

Team up with up to 4 players to save New York City in our latest PvE mode: Blood Hunt. Test your limits with different difficulties and send the Lord of the Night to his undead doom.

trending_videos.title: Boston Bruins at Buffalo Sabres
trending_videos.description: The Bruins face the Sabres in Game 2 of the East first round at KeyBank Center. Buffalo leads 1-0 after a 4-3 win. Tage Thompson scored twice to tie the game in the third period while Mattias Samuelsson netted the winning goal for the Sabres.

trending_videos.title: Silo — Season 3 Official Teaser | Apple TV
trending_videos.description:
The truth will surface. Silo returns July 3 on Apple TV https://apple.co/_Silo

“Silo” is the story of the last ten thousand people on earth, their mile-deep home protecting them from the toxic and deadly world outside. However, no one knows when or why the silo was built and those who try to find out face fatal consequences. Ferguson stars as Juliette, an engineer who seeks answers about a loved one’s murder and tumbles onto a mystery that goes far deeper than she could have ever imagined, leading her to discover that if the lies don’t kill you, the truth will.

“Silo” is produced for Apple TV by Apple Studios. The series is executive produced by Yost, Michael Dinner, Nina Jack, Joanna Thapa, Ferguson, Morten Tyldum, Howey, Fred Golan, Rémi Aubuchon and AMC Studios.

Subscribe to Apple TV’s YouTube channel: https://apple.co/AppleTVYouTube

Follow Apple TV:
Instagram: https://instagram.com/AppleTV
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@AppleTV
Facebook: https://facebook.com/AppleTV

trailer_and_teaser_dominance.description: A significant portion of the trending videos are trailers and teasers for upcoming movies and TV series.
trailer_and_teaser_dominance.insight: Trailers for both upcoming movies and new seasons of TV shows are generating significant interest. This suggests a strong audience demand for entertainment content previews.

sports_event_highlights.description: Sports-related content is also trending, with two videos covering professional sports events.
sports_event_highlights.insight: Sports event highlights, particularly from major leagues, continue to engage viewers, indicating the potential for channels to capitalize on live sports coverage and post-event analyses.

music_video_interest.description: Music videos, though less dominant, remain a staple in trending content.
music_video_interest.insight: Music videos maintain their relevance in trending content, suggesting ongoing viewer interest in new music releases and official videos.

news_and_analysis.description: News programming is also represented in the trending list.
news_and_analysis.insight: News content, particularly opinion-based or primetime shows, has a notable presence, indicating an audience for current events and commentary.

diverse_creator_sources.description: Trending content comes from a variety of channels rather than being dominated by a single creator.
diverse_creator_sources.insight: The diversity in sources implies a wide range of content is being consumed and suggests opportunities for new creators to enter the market with unique offerings.

large_networks_and_individual_creators.description: Both large media networks and individual creators are succeeding in trending lists.
large_networks_and_individual_creators.insight: Established channels like Rotten Tomatoes and Warner Bros. have strong viewership, while individual creators like Topoppgen also make an impact, indicating varied viewer preferences.

focus_on_trailer_and_teaser_content.strategy: Develop engaging trailers and teasers for upcoming projects.
focus_on_trailer_and_teaser_content.rationale: Given the high engagement with trailer content, creating high-quality previews can capture viewer interest and drive anticipation.

enhance_sports_coverage.strategy: Expand coverage of sports events, including highlights and player analyses.
enhance_sports_coverage.rationale: With sports content trending, channels can leverage this interest by offering in-depth coverage and fan interactions.

capitalize_on_music_video_releases.strategy: Release music videos with engaging visuals and narratives.
capitalize_on_music_video_releases.rationale: Music videos continue to draw viewer interest, presenting a consistent opportunity for artists to promote new music.

expand news and commentary.strategy: Increase production of news and commentary content, focusing on trending topics.
expand news and commentary.rationale: Audiences are consuming news content, especially opinion pieces, providing an opening for content that offers unique perspectives on current events.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
